titleStmt.title: SII 28.252: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 252. (A.R. No. 406 of 1913.)

summary.p: Records the gift of the (village ?) Kaḷḷinattam separated from Āṟṟūr in Āṟṟūrnāḍu in Magadai-maṇḍalam as agaram with a new name Māyittāy-agaram after the Goddess of that ūr to Aruṇagirināthar Paṟmanābha bhaṭṭar (Paṟmanābha bhaṭṭar) of Ārita-gōttiram and [Āśvalāyana]-sūtram of Iṟaiva-naraiyūr by Tulukkaṇa-nāyakkar. The record is stated to have been inscribed in the kumudappaḍai in the front portion of the shrine of God Uḍaiyavar Tirumēnirttālī-aḍāyataṁbīṟanāṟ. (Tirumettaḷi-uḍaiya-taṁbirāṉār).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 1 Itaṉmel cellā ṉiṉṟa cukkila vavaruṣam Aṟpaci mātam [2 10 2] tiyati Ā tulukkaṇa nāyakkar Iṟaiva naraiyūr Āritakottira cu ṉa ttirattu Aruṇakirinātar
paṟmanāpa paṭṭaṟku makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu Āṟṟūr piṟivāṉa nivā ṟṟu vaṭakarai kaḷḷinattam Eṉṟu perāna Ivvūr Ammaṉ tirunāmattāle māyittāy Akaram Eṉṟu tārai vārttu Ivvūr
nāṉkellaiyum kallum nāṭṭi Āṟṟūr Uṭaiyavar tirumenitteḷi Aṭaiya tampirānār caṉṉitiyil kumutappaṭaiyil kallilum Eḻutik kuṭuttapaṭiyāle Inta tan(m)mattai cantirātityavarai
yum ṉāṅkaḷe celuttikkoṇṭu varakkaṭavom Ākavum Ippaṭikku Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu nāṭṭu ku ṭikku Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu veḷār Ampalavar Eḻuttu §A piece of stone in the same place contains the following fragment inscription
1. ṟaivanaraiyūr ārita kottirattu ācuvalāyaṉa cūttirattu aruṇakirinātar
2. �ṉ kellaikkuḷppaṭṭa eppeṟppaṭṭa cakalamāṉa naṉcey puṉcey
3. ṭṭum inta ūr nāṉkellaikku uḷppaṭṭa puṉceyum caṟuvamā-
4. ttaṉmacātanam paṇṇikkuṭutom inta taṉmattukku akitam paṇṇa
Digital edition of SII 28.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
